title: psychotria elmeriana
intro: Psychotria elmeriana, also known as Elmer's wild coffee or Elmer's psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria elmeriana include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine preparations such as tinctures and salves.
